name: If you touch me, I will marry you. Pt.1
short_description: “If you touch me, I will marry you.” is an escape room tag game where you can move your character to avoid obstacles and enjoy mini games.
detailed_description:
If INKIDOKI is touched by someone, she must marry that person.

Try to leave the house without being touched.

An adventure you never imagined awaits!

“If you touch me, I will marry you.” is an escape room tag game where you can move your character to avoid obstacles and enjoy mini games.

Enjoy a fun story that goes beyond your imagination.
about_the_game:

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Ukrainian
